entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species being studied for genetic male sterility.

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A genetic condition where the plant is unable to produce functional pollen.

entities.name: BROWN ARROW-SHAPED ANTHERS
entities.description: The morphological characteristic associated with male sterility in the identified source.

entities.name: UNIVERSITY OF QUEENSLAND
entities.description: The institution where the source of genetic male sterility was identified.

entities.name: B15B
entities.description: A specific pigeonpea line identified as a source of genetic male sterility.

entities.name: ROYES
entities.description: The cultivar from which the line B15B was derived.

entities.name: QPL-1
entities.description: A pigeonpea line used in the cross with B15B to study the genetic basis of male sterility.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process used to derive line B15B from the cultivar Royes.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of mating B15B and QPL-1 to produce F5 progenies.
